text: The world feels pristine and freshly orchestrated, as if each object is perfectly placed for a specific purpose. The modern, bright, almost clinical environment inspires curiosity in me—an urge to observe the interplay between innovation and daily existence. The presence of emergency equipment juxtaposed with creative displays evokes a comforting sense of readiness amid exploration. In here, surrounded by research questions and colorful walls, I feel a peculiar blend of excitement and contemplation—what new ideas might I discover today?
